title: Import data
subtitle: Bulk-load areas and collaborators from a CSV or Excel file

areas.format_cols: CSV file with columns name, type, parent_area
areas.format_root: Leave parent_area empty for root nodes. Order does not matter — the system resolves the hierarchy.
areas.format_single_company: This workspace supports a single root company. If one already exists, import only its areas/teams under that structure.
areas.template_csv:
name,type,parent_area
Acme Corp,company,
Commercial Directorate,area,Acme Corp
North Sales,team,Commercial Directorate
South Sales,team,Commercial Directorate
areas.result_all_ok: The entire file was imported successfully.
areas.result_note: Valid rows have already been created. Only review the rejected ones before re-importing.

api_errors.rows_required: There are no rows to import.
api_errors.name_exists: A unit named "{{name}}" already exists. Unit names must be unique.
api_errors.duplicate: The unit "{{name}}" already exists with the same type and parent
api_errors.company_exists: A root company "{{name}}" already exists. This workspace supports a single company.
api_errors.company_parent_invalid: The root company cannot depend on another unit

collaborators.format_cols: CSV file with columns name, email, position, role, area
collaborators.format_email: email is optional. area must match exactly the name of an existing area.
collaborators.format_no_invite: Imported collaborators do not receive an invitation email. You can send it later from the collaborators list.
collaborators.template_csv:
name,email,position,role,area
John Smith,john@company.com,Sales Rep,collaborator,North Sales
Anna Brown,anna@company.com,Sales Lead,leader,Commercial Directorate
Mike Lee,,Analyst,collaborator,South Sales
collaborators.result_all_ok: The entire file was imported successfully.
collaborators.result_note: Valid collaborators have already been created. Only review the rejected rows before re-importing.

api_errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to import collaborators.
api_errors.rows_required: There are no rows to import.
